passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass offers 50% off  up to four ferry tickets to select Boston Harbor Islands. Ferries to Georges and Spectacle Islands are boarded at Long Wharf North Gate 5 in Downtown Boston. Ferries to Peddocks Island are boarded from Hingham.
    The Pass can be used for: Georges Island     May 1 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays   June 16 - September 1: every day
Spectacle Island     July 15 - September 1: every day     September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays     September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays
Peddocks Island from Hingham     June 15 - September 7: every day BUT Tuesdays     September 10 - October 12:  Fridays through Sundays
source_phrases: This pass offers 50% off  up to four ferry tickets to select Boston Harbor Islands. Ferries to Georges and Spectacle Islands are boarded at Long Wharf North Gate 5 in Downtown Boston. Ferries to Peddocks Island are boarded from Hingham.

Spectacle Island     July 15 - September 1: every day     September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays     September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays
Peddocks Island from Hingham     June 15 - September 7: every day BUT Tuesdays     September 10 - October 12:  Fridays through Sundays

passes.title: Harvard Museum Of Natural History
passes.benefit_text:
Pass gives patrons 50% off admission for up to four people.
This is a coupon pass that must be picked up at the Library during open business hours.
source_phrases: Pass gives patrons 50% off admission for up to four people.
This is a coupon pass that must be picked up at the Library during open business hours.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass provides free parking to one vehicle at over 50 facilities in the state parks system. 
You must return the pass the day after use.
source_phrases: This pass provides free parking to one vehicle at over 50 facilities in the state parks system.
You must return the pass the day after use.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Pass allows admission for 2 adults at  $10.00 each for both general admission and special exhibitions, and up to 4 children ages 7-17 at $10 each for special exhibition only.  There is no discount for children 7-17 for general admission, currently $10. 
Children 6 and under are free.
Please note that certain exhibitions require everyone, including members and children, to purchase or reserve a timed-entry exhibition ticket and to enter the gallery within the 30-minute entry window. Timed-entry exhibition tickets include general admission for the day of the visit.
Patrons who reserve tickets in advance online with the promo code will receive an e-mail with their admission ticket(s) attached and need to present their ticket(s) when they arrive at the Museum, preferably on a phone or device, but tickets printed on paper are accepted.
Click here for more information on how to prepare for your visit.
source_phrases: Pass allows admission for 2 adults at  $10.00 each for both general admission and special exhibitions, and up to 4 children ages 7-17 at $10 each for special exhibition only.  There is no discount for children 7-17 for general admission, currently $10.
Children 6 and under are free.

Please note that certain exhibitions require everyone, including members and children, to purchase or reserve a timed-entry exhibition ticket and to enter the gallery within the 30-minute entry window. Timed-entry exhibition tickets include general admission for the day of the visit.

Patrons who reserve tickets in advance online with the promo code will receive an e-mail with their admission ticket(s) attached and need to present their ticket(s) when they arrive at the Museum, preferably on a phone or device, but tickets printed on paper are accepted.
Click here for more information on how to prepare for your visit.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
    Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
    Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.
When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on your phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the Library.

If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on your phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the Library.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
Library ID: 285200
This coupon allows 50% off standard admission to the New England Aquarium.
·         Only applies to adult and child pricing.
·         This is not a ticket.
·         Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
·         Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
source_phrases: Library ID: 285200
This coupon allows 50% off standard admission to the New England Aquarium.
·         Only applies to adult and child pricing.
·         This is not a ticket.
·         Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
·         Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
·         Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
·         Valid only for Aquarium admission.
·         This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
·         Void if altered or copied. No cash value.
·         Hours of operation are subject to change.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
Library passes for North Shore Children's Museum admit up to 5 people (adults and children over 12 months) at 50% off admission price. This is an ePass that can either be presented on a mobile device or as a print-out to receive the discounted admission rate in-person. Advanced ticket purchase is strongly recommended but not required. The discounted admission  rate can be accessed on our website by selecting Library Museum Pass on the ticketing page. Your library pass will only be honored on the date you reserved. If the museum reaches capacity, visitors will be let in on a one in, one  out basis.
For hours and questions, call NSCM at 978-538-5765 or visit the museum's website .
source_phrases: Library passes for North Shore Children's Museum admit up to 5 people (adults and children over 12 months) at 50% off admission price. Advanced ticket purchase is strongly recommended but not required. The discounted admission  rate can be accessed on our website by selecting Library Museum Pass on the ticketing page. Your library pass will only be honored on the date you reserved. If the museum reaches capacity, visitors will be let in on a one in, one  out basis.
For hours and questions, call NSCM at 978-538-5765 or visit the museum's website .

passes.title: North Shore Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits two adults at $12 per person.  Children under age 16 are always admitted free. Admission to Yin Yu Tang, the Chinese House, and special ticketed exhibitions may require a separate fee. Visitors using a library pass are not entitled to any other member benefits.
Please visit the museum website for information on visiting policies.
This pass uses a discount code. You will receive the discount code via email after booking this pass. Please note that for the month of October, you must then purchase tickets from the museum ahead of time. See confirmation email for instructions.

Please visit the museum website for information on visiting policies.

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text: This pass allows free admission to the museum for up to 5 people per day. One pass per party, please.
source_phrases: This pass allows free admission to the museum for up to 5 people per day. One pass per party, please.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass is valid for the Franklin Park Zoo in Boston and Stone Zoo in Stoneham, MA.
Admits 6 people at $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child. Children 2 years and younger are free.
You should not buy tickets online. Bring your Library pass to buy tickets at the gate, library pass holders do not need advance time entry tickets.
Please note that Library passes DO NOT apply to ZooLights.
 To help plan your visit, please visit the Zoo website .
